subject: Payment failed for your workspace
snippet: Your payment failed and service may be suspended tomorrow unless you update billing.
body: Your payment failed and service may be suspended tomorrow. Please update billing from the official console.

subject: Interview schedule adjustment
snippet: Could you confirm whether next Tuesday afternoon works for a short interview?
body: Could you confirm whether next Tuesday afternoon works for a short interview? If another slot is better, please suggest alternatives.

subject: Weekly AI tools roundup
snippet: Here are ten new AI tools to try this week.
body: Weekly digest of AI tools, links, promotions, and community highlights.

subject: New sign-in detected
snippet: A new sign-in was detected. Review this activity if it was not you.
body: A new sign-in was detected from a new device. Review this activity from the official account security page if it was not you.
